case_title: CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION vs. WILLIAM, CURTIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAM, CURTIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDGE:GEORGE CHOPPELAS/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:MAUREEN BRADY C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ENTERED ON RECORD.
